examples.title: Software systems tender analysis
examples.summary: Analyse a buyer requirement for enterprise or regulated software delivery, then identify the evidence needed to support delivery, security, risk, and implementation claims.

examples.title: Framework call-off readiness
examples.summary: Check whether the organisation can answer framework-specific questions with approved examples, policies, accreditations, and named delivery artefacts.

examples.title: Unsupported claim prevention
examples.summary: Detect claims such as sector experience, security capability, delivery methodology, or social value commitments that are not yet backed by approved evidence.

capabilities: Extracting buyer requirements from tender material
Identifying compliance blockers and submission risks
Scoring bid readiness with transparent deterministic rules
Summarising buyer needs for bid/no-bid decisions
Refusing unsupported claims when evidence is absent
